description: A structural, function-first, blueprint-inspired aesthetic for a developer-centric MCP Server Dashboard. It leans heavily into raw aesthetics, monospaced typography for data, and stark contrast to reinforce authority and clarity. A 'Terminal/Retro-Futurism' micro-theme is applied specifically to the live testing/JSON response areas to create a 'Control Room' feel.

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-full h-screen overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row bg-[#FFFFFF]

panels.sidebar: w-full md:w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#F5F5F5] overflow-y-auto
panels.main: flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden border-r border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#FFFFFF]
panels.terminal: w-full md:w-[400px] lg:w-[500px] flex-shrink-0 bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#00E559] flex flex-col overflow-hidden

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all inputs, labels, and JSON outputs. Center alignment only for empty states.

surfaces_and_borders.inputs: border border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#FFFFFF] focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7] transition-all
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Not recommended for this archetype. Use solid panels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#001B66] transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#F5F5F5] transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.destructive: bg-[#FF2A2A] text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#CC0000] transition-colors rounded-none

badges.active: bg-[#00E559]/10 text-[#00E559] border border-[#00E559]/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase
badges.inactive: bg-[#999999]/10 text-[#666666] border border-[#999999]/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase

forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-[#0A0A0A] mb-1.5 block
forms.input: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-[#E5E5E5] bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#002FA7] rounded-none placeholder:text-[#999999]
forms.select: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-[#E5E5E5] bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#002FA7] rounded-none

tables_lists.header: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#666666] bg-[#F5F5F5] py-3 px-4 text-left

motion.hover_states: Crisp, immediate color swaps. No slow fades. Use transition-colors duration-150.
motion.focus_states: High-contrast ring. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-1 focus:outline-none
motion.loading: ASCII-style loaders or stark monochrome progress bars. No soft spinning circles.

icons.style: Stroke-based, consistent 1.5px or 2px weight. Avoid filled icons.

visual_enhancers.background_pattern: CSS Data Grid: Use a subtle 20px by 20px CSS grid background on empty states. e.g. background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #e5e5e5 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #e5e5e5 1px, transparent 1px);
visual_enhancers.terminal_scanline: For the JSON testing panel, an optional CSS scanline overlay can be added using a repeating linear gradient with 2-3% opacity to enhance the Retro-Futurism feel.

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tool items, and JSON output panels MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='config-save-button', data-testid='tool-item-get-contacts', data-testid='live-test-execute-button').

images.description: Dark abstract background with faint grid lines. Can be used as a subtle overlay for the dark terminal panel if needed, though pure CSS is preferred.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Install required icons: lucide-react (already in package.json).
Use a strictly 3-column layout (or 2-column with a collapsible right panel) to fit the Control Room grid archetype. Left: Config & Status. Center: Tool Explorer. Right: Live Testing Terminal.
Do NOT use generic Vercel/Stripe soft shadows or rounded corners. Enforce rounded-none everywhere. Borders should be sharp 1px solid lines.
The Live Testing Terminal MUST have a dark theme (Void Black #0A0A0A) contrasting sharply with the rest of the light UI. Use JetBrains Mono for the JSON output.
Form inputs should also use a monospace font to emphasize the 'developer tool' aesthetic.
Ensure the layout is completely fluid and uses h-screen to feel like a native desktop app.
DO NOT use the Card component for the main layout frames. Use raw div with explicit border-r / border-b styling to create a flush, seamless grid.
